title: Canton of Blois-2

infobox.value: This [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher") geographical article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Canton_of_Blois-2&action=edit).

(French: *canton de Blois-2*, [[kɑ̃tɔ̃ də blwa dø]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a [canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_France "Cantons of France") in the [French department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France") of [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher"), [Centre-Val de Loire](/wiki/Centre-Val_de_Loire "Centre-Val de Loire"), [France](/wiki/France "France"). Its borders were modified at the French canton reorganisation which came into effect in March 2015. Its seat is in [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois").[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

outgoing_links.target_title: Canton of Montrichard Val de Cher

[Coordinates](/wiki/Geographic_coordinate_system "Geographic coordinate system"): [47°35′N 1°20′E﻿ / ﻿47.59°N 1.34°E﻿ / 47.59; 1.34](https://geohack.toolforge.org/geohack.php?pagename=Canton_of_Blois-2&params=47.59_N_1.34_E_)

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Canton of Loir-et-Cher, France

The **Canton of Blois-2** (French: *canton de Blois-2*, [[kɑ̃tɔ̃ də blwa dø]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French")) is a [canton](/wiki/Cantons_of_France "Cantons of France") in the [French department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France") of [Loir-et-Cher](/wiki/Loir-et-Cher "Loir-et-Cher"), [Centre-Val de Loire](/wiki/Centre-Val_de_Loire "Centre-Val de Loire"), [France](/wiki/France "France"). Its borders were modified at the French canton reorganisation which came into effect in March 2015. Its seat is in [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois").[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

It consists of the following communes:[[1]](#cite_note-decret-1)

1. [Blois](/wiki/Blois "Blois") (partly)
2. [La Chaussée-Saint-Victor](/wiki/La_Chauss%C3%A9e-Saint-Victor "La Chaussée-Saint-Victor")
3. [Menars](/wiki/Menars "Menars")
4. [Saint-Denis-sur-Loire](/wiki/Saint-Denis-sur-Loire "Saint-Denis-sur-Loire")
5. [Villebarou](/wiki/Villebarou "Villebarou")
6. [Villerbon](/wiki/Villerbon "Villerbon")
